pathAssistantSteps.info:
Legal Team will finalize the Agreement:

  1. Review Agreement Code, Name and Company
  2. Validate Agreement Roles
  3. Enter Signature Date
  4. Update Status to 'Signed'

If your approval has been rejected, please follow the next steps:

  1. Update the relevant information and re-submit your request
  2. Click on Submit for Approval button to finalize it + Include in the text box any relevant additional information
  3. Recall the request if you need to do any change to the initial request

Verify if the Agreement Request is accurate and complete. Please note that Compliance will verify ONLY the Agreements with a MEDIUM or HIGH Risk Level

  1. Review Agreement Code, Name and Company
  2. Check Code Type
  3. Verify Agreement Roles
  4. Complete the Regulatory Checks Section
  5. Tick Compliance Clearing if the counterparty meets KYC / KYD / ALM requirements
  6. Click on Approve to approve and send the request to Global Head of Sales + Include any additional details in the text box
  7. Click on Reject to reject the request and demand any change to be completed by Investor Services + Include any additional details in the text box

Verify if the Agreement Request is accurate and complete:

  1. Review Agreement Request, Company and Grid level
  2. Click on Approve to approve and send the request to Legal Team + Include any additional details in the text box
  3. Click on Reject to reject the request and demand any change to be completed by Compliance + Include any additional details in the text box

Verify if the information of the Agreement Request is accurate and complete:

  1. Check Code Type (i.e. Distribution Agreement, Placement Agreement, etc.)
  2. Review that the Company is accurate
  3. Review Grid Section: Grid, Effective Date, Permanent Agreement & Grid End Date
  4. Click on Approve to approve and send the request to Investor Services + Include any additional details in the text box
  5. Click on Reject to reject the request and demand any change to be completed by CRM + Include any additional details in the text box

Make sure the Agreement Request is completed:

  1. Agreement should be linked to a Company
  2. Legal Entity should be created in the system and it should be linked to the relevant Company
  3. Agreement Roles should contained the Legal Entities and the relevant roles (cf. check the Counterparties Mapping in case of question)
  4. Rebates Section:
    1. Check with Investor Services and Legal Team the relevant Grid to be applied
    2. An Effective Date must be selected
      1. If the Agreement is permanent: tick the box + do NOT select a Grid End Date
      2. If the Agreement is NOT permanent: untick the box + select the relevant Grid End Date
  5. Click on Submit for Approval button to finalize it + Include in the text box any relevant additional information
  6. Recall the request if you need to do any change to the initial request
